hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.sh) command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && shellcheck --severity=warning "$f" >&2 ;; *.zsh|*/zshrc|*/zshenv|*/zprofile) command -v zsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && zsh -n "$f" >&2 ;; esac; exit 0
